"[202] ^CT654 ADVS HIMSELF AND CT654-2 ARE ENRT TO RELEIVE THE DAY CREW FOR HARD CLSR// ETA 10 MINS [Shared]"

"[200] 108-R5 EB TRAFFIC WAS RELEASED [Shared]"
"[198] 108-S15; WB CLOSURE IS 1 MILE AND EB CLOSURE IS 1/2 MILE [Shared]"
"[197] 180-L1 INQ'ING ON THE CONE PATTERN LENGTH/DISTANCE [Shared]"
"[196] 108-S9 WILL CHK WITH CAL FIRE - HOWEVER BOTH EB AND WB #2 LN CLOSED FOR EQUIP - WILL CHK ON ETA FOR OPENING [Shared]"
"[195] 108-L1 HOW LONG WILL THE EB #2 LN CLOSED ? [Shared]"
"[194] 108-S9 EB LNS #1 LN OPEN , HOLDING #2 LN CLOSED FOR NOW FOR THE FIRE EQUIP [Shared]"
"[193] 108-S3 ALL EB LNS OPEN PER S9 [Shared]"
"[191] 108-S3 98 ; 108-S3 HANDLING FIRE [Shared]"

"[184] 108-R5 97 W/ CT IN CD [Shared]"
"[180] ^1039 CT650---HE ADVS 98 WITH WB 8 TO RIBBON WOOD// HE ADVS 97 W/ NEW CLSR--- EB 8 / CRESTWOOD TO LA POSTA IN THE #2LN [Shared]"
"[179] Secondary Location for 108-062: WB 8 CRESTWOOD OFR - OPEN NOW, [Shared]"
"[178] S3 HAVE 81 MOVE TO MAIN LANE , DONT NEED ANYONE AT OLD 80/BUCKMAN AT THIS TIME, NEED TO MOVE TO MAIN LINE TO START OPENING EB SIDE [Shared]"
"[177] ^CT CPZ LINE 175// 1021 CT650---NA [Shared]"
"[176] 108-62 ADVS S UNIT WB CLOSURE IS PICKED UP AND TRAFFIC IS COMING THROUGH [Shared]"
"[175] 108-R2 CT IS PICKING UP CLOSURE WB 8 AT RIBBONWOOD- DO THEY NEED US TO BRING IN TRAFFIC SLOWLY? [Shared]"
"[171] A108-081 81 IS 97 WITH CT AT BUCKMAN / OLD 80 CLOSURE [Shared]"
"[165] 1039 STAM UPDATED INFO IN LOG FOR CLSRS [Shared]"
"[162] 108-D4 97 SUNRISE ONR TO EB 8 - PER S3 LOOKS LIKE CT ALREADY HAS THIS CLOSURE IN PLACE, HAVE D4 MOVE TO BUCKMAN - D4 COPIES ENRT TO BUCKMAN [Shared]"
"[161] ^1039 CT HQ (MIKE) W/ UPDATED CLSR FOR EB 8 [Shared]"
"[160] ^CT650 -- WILL HAVE THE EB 8/BUCKMAN SPRINGS CLSR IN PLACE IN JUST A COUPLE MINS [Shared]"
"[151] 108-S3 HAVE D4 GO TO SUNRISE HWY TO EB TO ASST CT MOVING CLOSURE - [Shared]"

"[144] ^CT650 -- THE CT651 CREW WILL MOVING/REPLACING THE EB 8/KITCHEN CREEK CLSR BACK TO BUCKMAN SPRINGS / ONCE THE NEW CLSR IS IN PLACE, EB 8 TRFC WILL BE DIVERTED OFF FWY TO BUCKMAN SPRINGS, WHERE TRFC CAN TRAVEL SB BUCKMAN SPRINGS TO SR-94, THEN HEAD EB SR-94 TO THE I-8 [Shared]"
"[142] PSDSI JONES 1039 ENTAC - THEY COPY ALL [Shared]"
"[140] Secondary Location for A108-016M: I8 E / KITCHEN CREEK RD ONR, I8 E / KITCHEN CREEK RD ONR,Unincorporated, CA 91962. [Shared]"
"[137] 108-S3 S3 NOTIFY 16M TO KIT CREEK TO ONR EB 8 / WILL MOVE CLOSURE TO BUCKMAN LATER ON [Shared]"
"[134] 1039 PSDS OFC TO NOTIFY ENTAC [Shared]"

"[127] ^CT650 -- FIRE HAS JUMPED I-8 FWY AND IS NOW BURNING SOUTH OF THE 8 // SOUNDS LIKE CORDS IS SETTING UP CLSR OF OLD HWY 80 BTWN LA POSTA and CRESTWOOD; ALSO SOUNDS LIKE CORDS IS STILL WORKING W/ DETOURED I-8 TRFC TO ALLOW RE-ENTRY TO WB 8 FROM OLD HWY 80, BUT WEST OF THERE, TRFC WILL NOT BE ALLOWED ON OLD HWY 80 HEADED TOWARD LA POSTA [Shared]"
"[121] ^CT650 CPZ REQ FOR PCMS'S // WILL HAVE CREWS CHANGE THEM TO ADV OF CLSRS [Shared]"
"[120] 311 INQ WITH 62 CAN BIG RIG TRAFFIC ACCESS SB BUCKMAN TO EB 94 TO RIBONWOOD TO EB 8 / WILL THAT ROAD HANDLE THEM ? [Shared]"
"[117] 108-S3 IF WE CAN UPDATE CMS SIGN ON EB 8 THAT FWY CLOSED AT KITCHEN CREEK [Shared]"

"[116] ^CT650 -- 1097 // CONFIRMED THE FOLLOWING CLSRS: EB 8 IS CLOSED AT KITCHEN CREEK/CAMERON; WB 8 IS CLOSED AS SR-94/RIBBONWOOD (TRFC CAN USE SB RIBBONWOOD, TO WB OLD HWY 80, THEN RE-ENTER WB 8 FROM OLD HWY 80) [Shared]"
"[115] 108-311 CT WENT 98 KC TO ONR EB 8 , S3 ENRT [Shared]"
"[114] ^1039 CT HQ [Shared]"
"[113] ^1021 CT HQ FOR WB CLOSURE // LEFT MESSAGE FOR HQ TO CALL BACK [Shared]"
"[103] ^CT651-3 -- KC ONR TO EB 8 CLOSED [Shared]"
"[101] ^CT651-3 -- ALSO 1097 EB @ KC; WILL HAVE KC ONR TO EB CLOSED IN ABOUT 5 MINS [Shared]"
"[100] MZP1 HARD CLOSURE ESTABLISED WB 8 X RIBONWOOD / ALL TRAFFIC DIVERTED OFF [Shared]"
"[99] ^1039 CT 7X FOR EB CLOSURE [Shared]"
"[98] ^1039 MIKE AT CT HQ FOR EB CLOSURE [Shared]"
"[97] ^CT651-2 -- 1097 W/ HARD CLSR OF EB 8 -- ALL TRFC DIVERTED OFF TO KITCHEN CREEK [Shared]"

"[81] MZP1 FIRE RIGS ON THE 8 SOME VEHS COMING THEIR WAY ADVS THEM / CONING OFF THE ONR NOW [Shared]"

"[79] MZP1 STAM WAS RUNNING BREAK TRYING TO DIVERT OFF AT RIBONWOOD / MZP1 RIBONWOOD CONING OFF ONR TO WB 8 [Shared]"
"[75] MZP1 WAS WAITING ON CT TO SHUT DOWN CAN TAKE OVER BREAK 8 W X CRESTWOOD [Shared]"
"[73] S15 FIRE WILL LET FIRE BURN DOWN TO THE I8 / WILL USE I8 AS A NATURAL FIRE BREAK / WILL BE A LONG TERM CLOSURE [Shared]"
"[70] *** 83 STAM PUTTING HARD CLOSURE ON OLD HWY 80 / TURNING TRAFFIC ON CRESTWOOD TO USE CHURCH TO HEAD ONTO 94 / OLDE HWY 80 X CRESTWOOD CLOSED AS WELL [Shared]"

"[65] MZP2 WILL DIVERT TRAFFIC OFF AT KITCHEN CREEK BUT VEHS CAN GET BACK ON THERE SO 311 CAN HELP THERE [Shared]"
"[64] ^CT 653 CALLED BACK TO ADVS CT WILL NOT BE CLOSING DOWN THE WHOLE FRWY ON WB SIDE // PER CT 650 WILL CLOSE WB ONR AND OFR AT CRESTWOOD AND DIVERT PEOPLE TO OLD HWY 80 [Shared]"
"[63] 311 ETA 30 MINS [Shared]"
"[60] *****S15 STAGING AREA AT NORTHWEST END OF GOLDEN ACORN / CP IS AT 8 CRESTWOOD RD / ENRT [Shared]"
"[56] ^CT 653 COPIES THE REQ FOR CLOSURE WB AT 94/RIBBONWOOD // DOES NOT THINK THAT IS A GOOD IDEA // WILL 1021 CT 650 AND CALL BACK [Shared]"
